Project_Description: [AD]² is an assistive device designed for individuals with Alzheimer's disease to assist them in remembering their loved ones. The system integrates event-related potential (ERP) EEG with eye-tracking and monitors users’ neurophysiological responses to determine whether they recognize a person. When non-recognition is detected, it delivers personalized visual and auditory cues as a reminder. By automating reminders, [AD]² aims to reduce caregiver burden while lowering patient frustration associated with memory lapses and social disorientation.
Team_Members: Daniel Szelepcsenyi, Hailey Yena Kim, Vivien Yu, Yoonhee Park
